title: lepicephalus inflexus
intro: Lepicephalus inflexus, also known as the Mexican prickly poppy, is a perennial flowering plant native to Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a natural analgesic. The health benefits of Lepicephalus inflexus include its potential to alleviate pain, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues, making it a valuable remedy for various health concerns. Lepicephalus inflexus is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture, with some herbalists also using it in salves and ointments to take advantage of its topical benefits.
